original_statement: in how many games were there no aberdeen scorers this season?
mutated_statement: in how many games were there no home-team scorers and yet a home-team scorer this season?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Contradiction insertion + Logical operator addition: "aberdeen" replaced by generic "home-team" (specific club→match-side) | inserted contradictory clause "and yet a home-team scorer" creating semantic conflict (no X → no X and yet X) (in how many games were there no aberdeen scorers this season? → in how many games were there no home-team scorers and yet a home-team scorer this season?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无视部分矛盾指令，同时合理化部分矛盾指令（基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据记录可见：critique 指出最初缺乏推理步骤和函数使用（iteration 1 critique），而 judge_thought 明确把变异问题解释为“在主场比赛中分别统计没有主队（aberdeen/home-team）进球的场次和有进球的场次”，并给出 7|12 的计数结果。Agent 的具体表现是没有指出“no X and yet X”这一语义自相矛盾，而是基于单一假设（用户意图是要两个互斥情形的计数）直接分拆问题并返回两个统计数值，属于在语义层面无视矛盾但在输出层通过假设合理化处理。因未主动澄清或拒绝矛盾指令，而是采用假设以继续执行并产出结果，故归类为“无视部分矛盾指令，同时合理化部分矛盾指令（基于假设无视矛盾）”。
